title: mostly almost vanilla
description: Curated mods that enhance gameplay, whilst keeping a mostly vanilla experience.
body:
Tryna craft those stone tools wit that cobblestone? psh... Tryna craft that sweet iron pickaxe? psh... I see you starin at those diamonds. Download and play to enjoy a freshly new and nostalgic feeling of discovery.

This modpack aims at improving the base gameplay of Minecraft. It adds dimensions to the vanilla experience - combat and difficulty, exploration, automation and scaling progression.

--- This modpack owes all its credit to the authors and creators of all used mods ---

Over 250 mods:

- Progression Reborn
- Create
- Wizards, Archers and Paladins & Priests (RPG Series)
- YUNG's mods
- BetterNether & BetterEnd
- Bosses of Mass Destruction
- Dungeons and Taverns
- ChoiceTheorem's Overhauled Village (CTOV)
- End Remastered with Ender Dragon Fight Remastered
- Fabric Seasons and biome temperatures (EnvironmentZ)
- Numismatic Overhaul
- Sodium and Flywheel
- Complementary Shaders
